text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
FormSchema<T> is generic over the value type.
When T is supplied (e.g. CreateUserCommand),
field keys are constrained to keyof T & string —
typos are COMPILE errors. Default permissive
for legacy callers.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Discriminated union — each variant declares
ONLY the props that make sense for its type.
A text field can no longer carry options /
mask / currency at compile time.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
Pure predicate evaluated on every form-state
tick. Returning false REMOVES the control
from the FormGroup until it flips back —
so hidden required fields don't block submit.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
FormGroup-level validator. Runs on every
value change, registers errors keyed by
'xfield:<rule.id>' on each targeted control,
so the field-level error renderer surfaces them.

div.style: text-align: center; white-space: break-spaces; display: table; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; width: 200px;

span.p:
tab:change is the canonical event.
section:tab-change is preserved for back-
compat — both fire on tab navigation
until the legacy name is removed.

svg.text: DPH UI Kit — Forms · Discriminated Schema · Layouts · Validators · Events
